steps.title: Identify the contrast with sentimentality
steps.content: The passage contrasts Whistler's approach with his contemporaries' sentimental methods. The answer must be the opposite of sentimental.

steps.title: Match the opposite of sentimental
steps.content: Dispassionate means emotionally detached — the opposite of sentimental. The passage points to this through the comparison to “objective documentations of life” — confirming Whistler's analytical, unemotional approach. The others don't capture this contrast: nostalgic leans sentimental, while tranquil and peculiar describe unrelated qualities. That matches choice D — D is correct.
